    U

    update(int, String, double) - Method in class app.services.BudgetService
    Updates an existing budget by adding a new spending amount.
    update(int, String, double) - Method in class app.services.UserService
    Updates the user's budget when a transaction is made.
    updateBudget(int, String, double) - Method in class app.controllers.UserController
    Updates the budget for a specific user and category based on spending.
    User - Class in app.models
    Represents a system user with basic financial and authentication information.
    User(int, String, String, double) - Constructor for class app.models.User
    Creates a new user with the given details.
    UserController - Class in app.controllers
    Controller class responsible for handling user-related requests such as signup, login, and budget updates.
    UserController() - Constructor for class app.controllers.UserController
     
    UserService - Class in app.services
    Service class responsible for user management operations such as signup, login, and budget-related updates.
    UserService() - Constructor for class app.services.UserService
